title: SMELLCC: LLM-based Code Smell Refactoring
summary: This GitHub repository presents SMELLCC, a VS Code extension that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to automatically refactor the top 10 most frequent Python code smells detected by SonarLint. It integrates Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting with models such as DeepSeek and OpenAI to generate context-aware fixes. The tool is the prototype system for the paper 'Clean Code, Better Models: Enhancing LLM Performance with Smell-Cleaned Dataset' and provides native Quick Fix integration via VS Code's lightbulb interface. Supported smells include long parameter lists, dead code, collapsible if statements, high cognitive complexity, and others.
author: Tdcq14
